definition: Identify similarities and differences between two or more items. Both similarities AND differences are expected unless otherwise stated.

expected_response.format: Point-by-point comparison across shared dimensions (climate, viticulture, wine style, etc.)
do_not: Describe each item separately without linking them
Cover only one item in detail

mark_expectation: 1 mark per valid comparative point; points must name BOTH items to earn the mark
question_stem_examples: Compare the climate and wine styles of Chablis and Meursault.
Compare the vinification of fino and oloroso Sherry.
mentor_hint: Organise by dimension: 'In terms of climate, X is [cool/warm] whereas Y is [cool/warm]...' — do not write an essay on X then an essay on Y.
